section.title: agent
section.para: Identifies the system agent that performed a specific localization task, for example an MT engine that automatically translated the content of a given <change>.
section.programlisting: <unit id="1"> <pvn:provenance> <pvn:change agent="Google Translate" appliesTo="target"/> </pvn:provenance> <segment> <source>Your annual tax certificate is now available for download.</source> <target>O seu certificado anual de impostos está dispoñible para descarga.</target> </segment> </unit>
